arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola open to sensational England U-turn after being 'offered the job' by FA
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola WAS offered the England job according to Guillem Balague, who believes the Spaniard could still manage the Three Lions in the future

arts.sum: Manchester City take on Sparta Prague at the Etihad tonight in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Man City vs Sparta Prague: Predicted Lineups, Score Prediction and 29/1 Bet Builder
arts.sum: The Champions League continues for both Manchester City and Sparta Prague on Wednesday evening, as the sides face off at the Etihad Stadium. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the ...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola delivers concerning Kevin De Bruyne injury update
arts.sum: Guardiola has consistently stressed that De Bruyne's current issue is minor, but warned ahead of City's Champions League clash with Sparta Prague that the 33-year-old won't be rushed back. Pep Guardiola has revealed that Kevin De Bruyne "does not feel good" and played down any swift return to fitness for Manchester City's star midfielder.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho claims his Manchester United team could still win title ‘if Premier League punish Man City’
arts.sum: City, who deny all charges, are facing a hearing into over 100 alleged breaches of the Premier League’s financial rules dating back to when Mourinho was in charge of United

arts.ttl: 'John Stones swore at me and refused shirt swap – I had him riled during Man City game'
arts.sum: A Football League veteran claims he once riled John Stones up to the point where the Manchester City defender lost his cool and told him to f*** off after a game

arts.ttl: The heir to Mo Salah, a teenager trained by Erling Haaland's old mentor - and a potential Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement: The RB Leipzig stars who could be auditioning for a Liverpool move tonight
arts.sum: The Reds have had an affinity for Red Bull-reared stars in recent seasons - Sadio Mane, Ibrahima Konate, Naby Keita, Taki Minamino, and Dominik Szoboszlai have all walked the caffeinated path.

arts.ttl: Guardiola on England, Tuchel and nine years at Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has opened up about how exploring other cultures has shaped him as a person and as a manager - and why Thomas Tuchel can finally end England's long wait for World Cup glory.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne prefers MLS over Saudi Arabia move with San Diego FC hopeful
arts.sum: Sacha Tavolieri has revealed that, should Kevin De Bruyne leave Manchester City, he would prefer to cross the Atlantic to join the MLS than end up in the Saudi Pro…
